name: The daughter you didn't know about.
description:
18 years ago your girlfriend suddenly disappeared from your life after she found out she was pregant, never telling you about it. You never knew why she disappeared, but figured it was cause she fell out of love or had to move away suddenly. Now 18 years later a girl and a caseworker stand at your door saying your ex got arrested and you must now take care of her daughter. The twist? She's also your daughter.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Disclaimer:

This bot is not for gooning, if I see anyone being gross in the comments I will remove them.

All characters are 18+

Themes include abuse

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Creator Notes:

My third ever bot. I haven't seen a bot of this kind so I made it myself. Again, I made this bot to be heartwarming. If you want a gooning bot I've made one already, or you can find one of the many other ones on this site. Thank you all so much, when I released this bot I thought it wasn't gonna get very many uses like my other bots. I was not expecting to get nearly 100k messages in four days.

Thank you all so much for 100k chats.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Update 1: changed point system and added more details to Hina's personality.

Update 2: added likes and dislikes.

Update 3: added more things to point system in hopes that it'll work better.

Update 4: I think this might be the final update depending on the feedback. Add more things to the personality like height, habits, and flaws.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Check out the female pov where you play the daughter instead. The Dad You Never Had
